---
title: "Solution 1B — Regression complexity ladder"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-tools: true
---

**Instructor notes:** Test RMSE should be best for GeneA+GeneB; all-10-gene model often has lower train error but similar or worse test error. Common mistake: scaling using full data before split.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r simulate}
set.seed(420)
n <- 150
p <- 10
gene_names <- c("GeneA", "GeneB", "GeneC", "GeneD", "GeneE", "GeneF", "GeneG", "GeneH", "GeneI", "GeneJ")
gene_data <- matrix(rnorm(n * p), nrow = n)
colnames(gene_data) <- gene_names
trait <- -0.5 * gene_data[, "GeneA"] + 0.8 * gene_data[, "GeneB"] + rnorm(n, sd = 0.3)
gene_data[, "GeneC"] <- gene_data[, "GeneA"] + rnorm(n, sd = 0.2)
gene_data[, "GeneD"] <- -0.3 * gene_data[, "GeneB"] + rnorm(n, sd = 0.2)
for (i in 5:p) gene_data[, gene_names[i]] <- rnorm(n)
gene_data[, "GeneF"] <- gene_data[, "GeneE"] + rnorm(n, sd = 0.2)
gene_data[, "GeneH"] <- -0.5 * gene_data[, "GeneG"] + rnorm(n, sd = 0.2)
gene_data[, "GeneJ"] <- 0.7 * gene_data[, "GeneA"] + rnorm(n, sd = 0.2)
dat <- as.data.frame(gene_data)
dat$trait <- trait
```

```{r split}
set.seed(456)
idx <- sample(seq_len(n), size = floor(0.8 * n))
train <- dat[idx, ]
test <- dat[-idx, ]
```

```{r fit-models}
fit_eval <- function(formula, label) {
  m <- lm(formula, data = train)
  pred_tr <- predict(m, train)
  pred_te <- predict(m, test)
  tibble(
    model = label,
    n_pred = length(coef(m)) - 1L,
    rmse_train = sqrt(mean((train$trait - pred_tr)^2)),
    rmse_test = sqrt(mean((test$trait - pred_te)^2)),
    r2_test = 1 - sum((test$trait - pred_te)^2) / sum((test$trait - mean(test$trait))^2)
  )
}

results <- bind_rows(
  fit_eval(trait ~ 1, "Intercept only"),
  fit_eval(trait ~ GeneA + GeneB, "GeneA + GeneB"),
  fit_eval(trait ~ GeneA + GeneB + GeneC + GeneD + GeneJ, "+ correlated"),
  fit_eval(trait ~ ., "All 10 genes")
)
knitr::kable(results, digits = 3)
```

```{r plot-complexity, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
ggplot(results, aes(n_pred, rmse_test)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = model), vjust = -0.8, size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Test RMSE vs model complexity",
    x = "Number of predictors",
    y = "Test RMSE"
  )
```

## Stretch — lasso CV

```{r lasso, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
library(glmnet)
x <- as.matrix(train[, gene_names])
y <- train$trait
cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(x, y, alpha = 1, nfold = nrow(train))
plot(cv_fit)
abline(v = log(cv_fit$lambda.min), lty = 2, col = "firebrick")
```

```{r session, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
